scenario_description: User asks agent to add a slide. Agent adds it but with wrong content. User provides the correct text.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Add a new slide at the end with some conclusion text

That conclusion doesn't capture what I want. Please replace it with: Title: 'Legacy of Arcade Gaming', Content: 'The arcade era established the foundation for the modern gaming industry worth over $200 billion today.'
Good. Now also add 'Sources: ESA Annual Report 2024' at the bottom of that slide. Save.

result.command: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; p=Presentation('/home/user/Desktop/The Golden Age of Arcade Games.pptx'); t=' '.join(r.text for s in p.slides for sh in s.shapes if sh.has_text_frame for pa in sh.text_frame.paragraphs for r in pa.runs); print('PASSED' if 'Legacy of Arcade Gaming' in t and 'ESA Annual Report' in t else 'FAILED')"
